meaning: completely knocked down 完全拆开的,完全分解的
examples: Scientists are continually looking for new ways to treat CKD and stop kidneys from deteriorating.
CKD is difficult to treat, and many patients progress to end-stage kidney disease and have to have dialysis or a kidney transplant.
A majority of CKD patients actually die from cardiovascular complications that arise from the high blood pressure associated with kidney malfunction.
John Bound, of CKD Galbraith in Inverness, said the local community had not formally registered an interest in buying the island.
In the UK, 10-15% of the population are classed as having CKD, and that is probably the population they should have studied.
